reasoning_chain: White-washed walls and stucco architecture with wrought-iron balconies are characteristic of rural Portuguese homes, especially in the Algarve or Alentejo regions.
The narrow, unpaved shoulder and lack of road markings suggest a low-traffic rural road common in southern Portugal.
Vegetation includes drought-tolerant trees like eucalyptus and olive groves, consistent with Mediterranean climates found in Portugal.
